lastDecisionLogEntry: - 2026-05-06 13:45: [partitioned] M50 â€” 2 file-disjoint domains scaffolded. D1 `m50-bootstrap-and-detection` owns `bin/playwright-bootstrap.cjs` + `bin/ui-detection.cjs` + CLI wiring in `bin/gsd-t.js` (replace inline `hasPlaywright` at 201-204; thread `installPlaywright` into `init`/`checkProjectHealth`/`checkDoctorProject`; new `gsd-t setup-playwright` subcommand) + ~25 unit tests across 3 test files. D2 `m50-gates-and-specs` owns `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` spawn-gate insertion + `scripts/hooks/pre-commit-playwright-gate` (opt-in via `gsd-t doctor --install-hooks`) + `playwright.config.ts` (root) + 5 E2E specs (`e2e/viewer/{title,timestamps,chat-bubbles,dual-pane,lazy-dashboard}.spec.ts`) + ~14 unit tests + doc-ripple owner (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, templates/CLAUDE-global.md, 8 command files, docs/architecture.md, CHANGELOG.md). New contracts: `playwright-bootstrap-contract.md` v1.0.0 (D1 library API), `m50-integration-points.md` (cross-domain checkpoint after D1 lands since both touch `bin/gsd-t.js`). Assumption audit locked: external refs (`bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` USE, `bin/gsd-t.js` USE, scan/quality tables INSPECT); ambiguity locks ("universal" = `hasUI`-gated not forced; "deterministic" = code-level not prose; `.last-playwright-pass` = per-file freshness compare not global TTL; `mode:'blocked-needs-human'` = headless session-state field surfaced via read-back banner). Consumer surfaces: GSD-T's existing CLI/hook/dashboard infrastructure consumes D1's library; D2 IS the spawn-gate + pre-commit hook + specs surface. SharedCore evaluation: D1's two new modules ARE the shared library â€” D2 imports directly via `require()`; no separate shared-core domain needed. Design brief / design contract: SKIPPED (no UI deps in package.json; viewer is vanilla single-file HTML). Pre-M50 baseline preserved: 2102/2104 (2 known env-sensitive flakes). Auto-advance to plan.
